summary: Lifecycle events that doctrine can tailor against.

events.label: Session Start
events.description: Initial runtime bootstrap for a new chat or a fresh agent session.

events.label: Task Execution
events.description: Unattended remote task launch, such as a Valet-started Codex or Claude job.

events.label: Memory Read
events.description: Scoped doctrine and memory fetch before a worker or runtime loads contextual memory.

events.label: Skill Load
events.description: Resolve a shared skill body or skill package for the active runtime.

events.label: Command Resolve
events.description: Resolve a named command or slash-command body for the active runtime.

events.label: Hook Dispatch
events.description: Handle lifecycle hook trampolines such as post-tool-use dispatch.

notes: Session start and task execution are the first two production events. Memory/skill/command/hook events are v1 placeholders for convergence.
